name: quick-tasks
description: Just a quick interface for quick tasks using Apple Reminders

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

This extension is intended for the Raycast Store.

Use \`bun run publish\` to publish it with Raycast.

" && exit 1

commands.name: open-quick-tasks
commands.title: Quick Tasks
commands.description: Just a quick interface for quick tasks using Apple Reminders

preferences.name: defaultListName
preferences.title: Default List Name
preferences.description: Optional exact Apple Reminders list name. Leave empty to use Reminders' default list.

preferences.name: sortOrder
preferences.title: Sort Order
preferences.description: Choose how open reminders are ordered.

title: Quick Tasks
author: nielsjaspers
